summary: The diff implements a comprehensive GharKharcha app covering all 12 requirements. Backend (REQ-1, REQ-2) is implemented in main.mo. Frontend components cover Dashboard, Calendar, Analysis, Reports, Settings, ExpenseModal, PINLock, Toast, BottomNav, and utility files. The implementation appears largely complete, though some files were truncated and 8 added files were omitted from the diff due to limits, making full verification of certain acceptance criteria uncertain.

missing_requirements.requirement: Smart Insights with Hindi-style English text, category-level comparison with last month, saving tip suggestions displayed as distinct cards with colored icons on the Dashboard
missing_requirements.reason: The insightGenerator utility is referenced in Dashboard.tsx but was not included in the diff (listed among the 8 omitted added files). Cannot confirm the Hindi-style text, saving tips, or colored icon cards are implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: App icon logo image (gharkharcha-logo.dim_128x128.png) with stylized house outline and rupee symbol on dark blue rounded square with green accent details
missing_requirements.reason: The image is referenced in Dashboard.tsx and PINLock.tsx but the actual image asset file is not included in the diff. Its generation or inclusion is not confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Seed data monthly totals must fall within 18000-28000 range and seed must not be re-inserted on subsequent canister restarts
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo was truncated. The categoryAverages show Rent=11520 with multiple days, Grocery=4800 with 4 days per month. Multiple entries per category could push monthly totals well above 28000. The stable storage seeding-once mechanism cannot be verified due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: FAB must be visible on the Dashboard screen, fixed bottom-right, green and circular
missing_requirements.reason: Dashboard.tsx was truncated and the FAB implementation section is not visible in the diff. Cannot confirm FAB is present.

hallucinated_features.description: PAYMENT_MODES includes 'Bank Transfer' instead of the specified 'Bank'
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies payment mode pill buttons as Cash, UPI, Card, Bank but categoryConfig.ts defines PAYMENT_MODES as ['Cash', 'UPI', 'Card', 'Bank Transfer'].

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication integration via useInternetIdentity and useActor hooks
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention Internet Identity or user authentication. The app uses II-based actor management which is not requested.
